title: The Eternal Skald
description:
An AI-powered storyteller, oracle interpreter, and tactical enemy controller for Ironsworn and Ironsworn: Delve campaigns in Foundry VTT v14. Powered by Abacus AI ChatLLM. Just type ! followed by your words to speak with the Skald, or !skald-help for all commands.

v0.3.2 — the Skald now answers to a bare ! alias (e.g. !what lurks in the barrow?), gated by a new AI Mode master toggle (default ON) in module settings and bindable to a keyboard shortcut (Alt+Shift+A by default) so the GM can mute or wake the AI mid-session. Builds on v0.3.1 compendium-based enemy ranks and the v0.3.0 automatic combat system — combat progress tracks per foe, harm by rank on Strike/Clash hits, initiative through Enter the Fray — on top of deep integration with the foundry-ironsworn rules engine (suggesting moves, triggering the system's own roll mechanics, narrating official outcomes, and applying mechanical effects). Works standalone too — Ironsworn features activate automatically when the system is present.

recommends.reason: Optional but recommended. When the Ironsworn system is active, the Skald integrates with its rules engine to trigger moves, read character state, and narrate official roll outcomes. The module also works standalone in any system, but Ironsworn-specific mechanics are then unavailable.
